title: U.N. Says Attacks on Iran Set to Drive Hunger to Record Levels
summary_full: Tens of millions more people around the world could face acute hunger as the war in the Middle East continues to disrupt shipping and drive up oil prices.
summary_public: Tens of millions more people around the world could face acute hunger as the war in the Middle East continues to disrupt shipping and drive up oil prices.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Attacks on Iran Set to Drive Hunger to Record Levels
